description: FUSE on two ACTIVE sessions with the same namespace MUST produce FUSE_ACK with a new non-zero ctx_ref for the merged context
normative_ref: spec/02-signals.md § FUSE, FUSE_ACK; spec/05-context-bundles.md § Fused Sessions

steps.comment: Open a second transport connection to the implementation.
Establish session B with the same namespace on the second connection.
Initiate FUSE from session A, targeting session B's UUID.
FUSE_ACK MUST contain a new non-zero ctx_ref for the merged context.
